mapper.select: /* DocumentReceiveMapper.getDocRcvDetail */ WITH DOC_RCV_STATUS AS ( SELECT DOC_RCV_ID , RCV_YN , RCV_DT , PROC_STATUS , PROC_DT FROM NMCP_DOC_RCV_STATUS STT WHERE DOC_SEQ = ( SELECT MAX(DOC_SEQ) FROM NMCP_DOC_RCV_STATUS WHERE DOC_RCV_ID = STT.DOC_RCV_ID ) ), DOC_RCV_URL AS ( SELECT RCV_URL_ID , DOC_RCV_ID , URL , STATUS , ISSUE_DT , EXPIRE_DT FROM ( SELECT RCV_URL_ID , DOC_RCV_ID , URL , STATUS , ISSUE_DT , EXPIRE_DT , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY DOC_RCV_ID ORDER BY ISSUE_DT DESC) AS RN FROM NMCP_DOC_RCV_URL ) WHERE RN = 1 ), DOC_RCV_URL_OTP AS ( SELECT RCV_URL_ID , SEQ , OTP , STATUS , ISSUE_DT , FAIL_CNT , LAST_AUTH_DT FROM NMCP_DOC_RCV_URL_OTP OTP WHERE SEQ = ( SELECT MAX(SEQ) FROM NMCP_DOC_RCV_URL_OTP WHERE RCV_URL_ID = OTP.RCV_URL_ID ) ) SELECT RCV.DOC_RCV_ID , RCV.RES_NO , RCV.TARGET_SEQ , RCV.REQUEST_DAY , TO_CHAR(RCV.REQUEST_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS REQUEST_DT , RCV.WORK_TMPL_ID , RCV.SMS_TEMPLATE_ID , RCV.MOBILE_NO , RCV.SCAN_ID , TMPL.WORK_ID , ( SELECT WORK_NM FROM EMV_SCAN_WORK WHERE WORK_ID = TMPL.WORK_ID) AS WORK_NM , TMPL.WORK_TMPL_NM , STT.RCV_YN , TO_CHAR(STT.RCV_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS RCV_DT , STT.PROC_STATUS , TO_CHAR(STT.PROC_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS PROC_DT , URL.RCV_URL_ID , URL.URL , URL.STATUS AS URL_STATUS , TO_CHAR(URL.ISSUE_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS URL_ISSUE_DT , TO_CHAR(URL.EXPIRE_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS URL_EXPIRE_DT , OTP.SEQ , OTP.OTP , OTP.STATUS AS OTP_STATUS , TO_CHAR(OTP.ISSUE_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS OTP_ISSUE_DT , OTP.FAIL_CNT , TO_CHAR(OTP.LAST_AUTH_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS LAST_AUTH_DT FROM NMCP_DOC_RCV RCV , NMCP_WORK_TMPL TMPL , DOC_RCV_STATUS STT , DOC_RCV_URL URL , DOC_RCV_URL_OTP OTP WHERE RCV.DOC_RCV_ID = #{docRcvId} AND RCV.WORK_TMPL_ID = TMPL.WORK_TMPL_ID AND RCV.DOC_RCV_ID = STT.DOC_RCV_ID AND RCV.DOC_RCV_ID = URL.DOC_RCV_ID AND URL.RCV_URL_ID = OTP.RCV_URL_ID

/* DocumentReceiveMapper.getDocRcvItemList */ SELECT DRI.ITEM_SEQ , DRI.DOC_RCV_ID , DRI.ITEM_ID , DRI.STATUS , TO_CHAR(DRI.RCV_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS FILE_RCV_DT , ITEM.ITEM_NM AS ITEM_NM , ITEM.REQUEST_YN AS REQUEST_YN FROM NMCP_DOC_RCV_ITEM DRI , NMCP_WORK_ITEM ITEM WHERE DRI.DOC_RCV_ID = #{docRcvId} AND DRI.ITEM_ID = ITEM.ITEM_ID ORDER BY (CASE WHEN REQUEST_YN = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END), ITEM.ITEM_NM
mapper.update: /* DocumentReceiveMapper.insertDocRcvStatusCompleteUpload */ INSERT INTO NMCP_DOC_RCV_STATUS ( DOC_RCV_ID , DOC_SEQ , RCV_YN , RCV_DT , PROC_STATUS , PROC_DT , CRET_ID , CRET_DT ) SELECT STT.DOC_RCV_ID , NVL(STT.DOC_SEQ, 0) + 1 , 'Y' , SYSDATE , 'M' , SYSDATE , #{serviceId} , SYSDATE FROM NMCP_DOC_RCV_STATUS STT WHERE STT.DOC_RCV_ID = #{docRcvId} AND STT.DOC_SEQ = ( SELECT MAX(DOC_SEQ) FROM NMCP_DOC_RCV_STATUS WHERE DOC_RCV_ID = STT.DOC_RCV_ID )
mapper.select: SELECT WT.WORK_ID , COALESCE(SUB.SUB_LINK_NAME, RC.CSTMR_NAME) AS CUST_NM , RCV.SCAN_ID FROM NMCP_DOC_RCV RCV , NMCP_WORK_TMPL WT , MCP_REQUEST R , MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR RC , MSP_REQUEST@DL_MSP MR , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP SUB WHERE RCV.DOC_RCV_ID = #{docRcvId} AND RCV.WORK_TMPL_ID = WT.WORK_TMPL_ID AND RCV.RES_NO = R.RES_NO (+) AND R.REQUEST_KEY = RC.REQUEST_KEY (+) AND RCV.RES_NO = MR.RES_NO (+) AND MR.CONTRACT_NUM = SUB.CONTRACT_NUM (+)
mapper.update: INSERT INTO NMCP_DOC_RCV_STATUS ( DOC_RCV_ID , DOC_SEQ , RCV_YN , RCV_DT , PROC_STATUS , PROC_DT , CRET_ID , CRET_DT ) SELECT STT.DOC_RCV_ID , NVL(STT.DOC_SEQ, 0) + 1 , STT.RCV_YN , SYSDATE , 'P' , SYSDATE , #{serviceId} , SYSDATE FROM NMCP_DOC_RCV_STATUS STT WHERE STT.DOC_RCV_ID = #{docRcvId} AND STT.DOC_SEQ = ( SELECT MAX(DOC_SEQ) FROM NMCP_DOC_RCV_STATUS WHERE DOC_RCV_ID = STT.DOC_RCV_ID )

INSERT INTO NMCP_DOC_RCV_STATUS ( DOC_RCV_ID , DOC_SEQ , RCV_YN , RCV_DT , PROC_STATUS , PROC_DT , CRET_ID , CRET_DT ) SELECT STT.DOC_RCV_ID , NVL(STT.DOC_SEQ, 0) + 1 , STT.RCV_YN , SYSDATE , 'F' , SYSDATE , #{serviceId} , SYSDATE FROM NMCP_DOC_RCV_STATUS STT WHERE STT.DOC_RCV_ID = #{docRcvId} AND STT.DOC_SEQ = ( SELECT MAX(DOC_SEQ) FROM NMCP_DOC_RCV_STATUS WHERE DOC_RCV_ID = STT.DOC_RCV_ID )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(ITEM_SEQ) FROM NMCP_DOC_RCV_ITEM WHERE ITEM_SEQ = #{itemSeq} AND STATUS = 'P'
mapper.update:
INSERT ALL
INTO NMCP_DOC_RCV_ITEM_FILE (ITEM_SEQ, FILE_ID, MERGE_YN, CRET_ID, CRET_DT, EXT, RESULT_CODE, RESULT_MESSAGE) VALUES (#{itemSeq}, #{file.fileId}, 'N', #{serviceId}, SYSDATE, #{file.ext}, #{file.resultCode}, #{file.resultMessage})
SELECT * FROM DUAL
